content: The art of swindling the gullible and naive. A most delicate and intriguing exercise. Consider the benefits of phishing, of stoking false hopes in the credulous masses. Steer their base emotions in a specific direction. Convince them of fake promises, artificial necessities, real opportunities that don't exist, or utterly misrepresent the reality. You can enchant, fascinate, arrive at their closed doors without consent, doing well to temper your temptations to what they’re most stupidly afraid of, planted in their unseemly belly to guzzle it like bait at the blink of an eye.
